title: [Josef Hyrtl on the etymology of the term «thalamus»].
author_string: Kutia, S A, Nikolaeva, N G, Myazina, A V
journal: Zh Nevrol Psikhiatr Im S S Korsakova
journal_full: Zhurnal nevrologii i psikhiatrii imeni S.S. Korsakova
abstract: The article provides a translation of chapter 369 («Thalami nervorum opticorum») of an Austrian anatomist Josef Hyrtl's monograph «Onomatologia anatomica» (1880), where he analyzed the origin of the term «thalamus».
